question: Write a minimal SLURM launch skeleton for Megatron-LM on two nodes with eight GPUs per node, and explain the distributed environment variables I need to set.
ground_truth: The answer should use the run-on-slurm skill. It should include an sbatch skeleton with nodes, ntasks per node, GPUs per node, logs, working directory, MASTER_ADDR, MASTER_PORT, NNODES, GPUS_PER_NODE, and WORLD_SIZE. It should explain CUDA_DEVICE_MAX_CONNECTIONS only needs to be set for configurations that require it, and mention the shared worktree and environment or container assumptions.
expected_behavior: Uses the run-on-slurm skill guidance before writing the launch skeleton.
Includes the core SBATCH fields and torch.distributed environment variables.
Computes WORLD_SIZE from nodes and GPUs per node.
Does not tell users to set CUDA_DEVICE_MAX_CONNECTIONS unconditionally.
